# ─── Slide builder functions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

def make_cover(prs):
    """Slide 1 — Cover page."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_DARK_BLUE)

    # Gradient-like left accent stripe
    add_rectangle(slide, 0, 0, Inches(0.5), SLIDE_H, C_GOLD)

    # Decorative horizontal rule
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(12.333), Inches(0.04), C_ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(5.05), Inches(12.333), Inches(0.04), C_ACCENT_BLUE)

    # Main title
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.9),
                "Multi-Paper Analysis Report",
                font_size=38, bold=True, color=C_WHITE, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    # Subtitle
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.6),
                "The GPT Series: From Supervised Fine-Tuning to Multimodal AI",
                font_size=22, bold=False, color=C_GOLD, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    # Paper list
    paper_lines = [
        "Paper 1  |  GPT-1 (2018) — Improving Language Understanding by Generative Pre-Training",
        "Paper 2  |  GPT-2 (2019) — Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners",
        "Paper 3  |  GPT-3 (2020) — Language Models are Few-Shot Learners",
        "Paper 4  |  GPT-4 (2024) — GPT-4 Technical Report",
    ]
    y = 2.75
    for line in paper_lines:
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(y), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.42),
                    line, font_size=16, color=C_LIGHT_BLUE, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
        y += 0.45

    # Date
    date_str = datetime.now().strftime("%B %d, %Y")
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.15), Inches(10.0), Inches(0.45),
                f"Generated: {date_str}  ·  OpenAI GPT Research Series  ·  NeurIPS / arXiv",
                font_size=13, color=C_LIGHT_BLUE, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)


def make_toc(prs, toc_data):
    """Slide 2 — Table of Contents."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, "Table of Contents", "Papers and Section Coverage")

    # Two columns
    col1_x, col2_x = Inches(0.4), Inches(6.8)
    y_base = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (paper_label, sections, slide_range) in enumerate(toc_data):
        col_x = col1_x if i < 2 else col2_x
        row_y = y_base if i % 2 == 0 else y_base + Inches(2.65)

        # Paper header band
        add_rectangle(slide, col_x, row_y, Inches(6.2), Inches(0.42), C_MID_BLUE)
        add_textbox(slide, col_x + Inches(0.1), row_y + Inches(0.04), Inches(5.6), Inches(0.36),
                    f"{paper_label}  (Slides {slide_range})",
                    font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

        for j, sec in enumerate(sections):
            sy = row_y + Inches(0.48) + j * Inches(0.33)
            add_textbox(slide, col_x + Inches(0.2), sy, Inches(5.8), Inches(0.32),
                        f"  ›  {sec}", font_size=12, color=C_DARK_GREY)


def make_overview(prs):
    """Slide 3 — Cross-paper overview."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, "Research Overview", "GPT Series: Evolution of Large Language Models")

    rows = [
        ["Model", "Year", "Params", "Training Data", "Key Innovation", "Task Adaptation"],
        ["GPT-1", "2018", "117M",   "BooksCorpus\n(800M tokens)",  "Pre-train + Fine-tune paradigm",  "Supervised fine-tuning"],
        ["GPT-2", "2019", "1.5B",   "WebText\n(40GB)",             "Zero-shot multitask learning",    "Zero-shot prompting"],
        ["GPT-3", "2020", "175B",   "~570GB filtered\nweb text",   "In-context few-shot learning",    "Few-shot prompting"],
        ["GPT-4", "2024", "~1T*",   "Proprietary +\nlicensed",     "Multimodal + predictable scaling","RLHF + in-context"],
    ]
    col_widths = [
        Inches(1.1), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.9), Inches(1.85),
        Inches(3.2), Inches(2.3)
    ]
    add_table(slide, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.45), Inches(12.7),
              rows, col_widths=col_widths, text_size=11)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.3), Inches(6.55), Inches(12.7), Inches(0.5),
                "* Estimated; architecture details for GPT-4 not publicly disclosed.",
                font_size=11, color=C_MID_BLUE, italic=True)


def make_separator(prs, paper):
    """Separator slide before each paper's section."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_DARK_BLUE)

    add_rectangle(slide, 0, 0, Inches(0.5), SLIDE_H, C_GOLD)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(12.333), Inches(0.06), C_ACCENT_BLUE)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.6),
                f"Paper {paper['id']}  ·  {paper['year']}",
                font_size=20, bold=False, color=C_GOLD, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(12.0), Inches(1.2),
                paper["title"].replace("\n", " — "),
                font_size=32, bold=True, color=C_WHITE, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.1), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.55),
                f"Authors:  {paper['authors']}",
                font_size=15, color=C_LIGHT_BLUE, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.7), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.45),
                f"Venue:  {paper['venue']}",
                font_size=14, color=C_LIGHT_BLUE, align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)


def make_basic_info(prs, paper):
    """Paper basic info slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Paper Basic Information",
                   f"{paper['year']}  ·  {paper['venue']}")

    items_left = [
        ("Title",   paper["title"].replace("\n", " — ")),
        ("Authors", paper["authors"]),
        ("Venue",   paper["venue"]),
        ("Year",    paper["year"]),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.5)
    for label, val in items_left:
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(2.0), Inches(0.42), C_MID_BLUE)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.35), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(1.9), Inches(0.36),
                    label, font_size=13, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(2.3), y, Inches(10.5), Inches(0.42), C_WHITE,
                      line_color=C_ACCENT_BLUE, line_width=Pt(0.5))
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(2.4), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(10.2), Inches(0.36),
                    val, font_size=13, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.55)

    # Abstract / positioning note
    y += Inches(0.2)
    position = {
        1: "GPT-1 introduced the pre-train + fine-tune paradigm that became the foundation of modern NLP.",
        2: "GPT-2 demonstrated zero-shot multitask learning, showing LMs implicitly learn tasks during training.",
        3: "GPT-3 scaled to 175B parameters to achieve few-shot in-context learning across 20+ benchmarks.",
        4: "GPT-4 integrated multimodal input (vision + language) and achieved human-level professional benchmark performance.",
    }
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(12.7), Inches(0.06), C_GOLD)
    y += Inches(0.15)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(12.7), Inches(0.6),
                f"Significance:  {position[paper['id']]}",
                font_size=14, color=C_MID_BLUE, italic=True)


def make_background(prs, paper):
    """Research background and motivation slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Research Background & Motivation")

    # Background column
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.45), Inches(7.5), Inches(0.4), C_MID_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.4), Inches(1.47), Inches(7.3), Inches(0.36),
                "Field Status & Existing Problems", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

    y = Inches(1.95)
    for item in paper["background"]:
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.35), y, Inches(0.06), Inches(0.28), C_GOLD)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.5), y - Inches(0.03), Inches(7.1), Inches(0.38),
                    item, font_size=14, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.42)

    # Motivation box
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(8.1), Inches(1.45), Inches(4.9), Inches(0.4), C_ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(8.2), Inches(1.47), Inches(4.7), Inches(0.36),
                "Research Motivation", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(8.1), Inches(1.88), Inches(4.9), Inches(2.5), C_WHITE,
                  line_color=C_ACCENT_BLUE, line_width=Pt(0.5))
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(8.2), Inches(1.93), Inches(4.7), Inches(2.4),
                paper["motivation"], font_size=14, color=C_DARK_GREY)


def make_contributions(prs, paper):
    """Core contributions slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Core Contributions")

    y = Inches(1.45)
    for i, contrib in enumerate(paper["contributions"]):
        # Number badge
        badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.05),
                                       Inches(0.42), Inches(0.42))
        badge.fill.solid()
        badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = C_GOLD
        badge.line.fill.background()
        tb = badge.text_frame
        tb.paragraphs[0].text = str(i + 1)
        tb.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = tb.paragraphs[0].runs[0]
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = C_DARK_BLUE

        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.82), y, Inches(12.0), Inches(0.5), C_WHITE,
                      line_color=C_ACCENT_BLUE, line_width=Pt(0.5))
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.95), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.42),
                    contrib, font_size=14, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.65)


def make_method(prs, paper):
    """Method/architecture slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Methods & Model Architecture")

    y = Inches(1.45)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(12.7), Inches(0.4), C_MID_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.4), y + Inches(0.04), Inches(12.4), Inches(0.34),
                "Technical Approach & Key Design Choices", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

    y += Inches(0.5)
    for item in paper["method"]:
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.35), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.12), Inches(0.12), C_GOLD)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(12.2), Inches(0.4),
                    item, font_size=14, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.47)


def make_exp_setup(prs, paper):
    """Experimental setup slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Experimental Setup")

    y = Inches(1.45)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(12.7), Inches(0.4), C_MID_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.4), y + Inches(0.04), Inches(12.4), Inches(0.34),
                "Datasets, Metrics & Comparison Methods", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

    y += Inches(0.5)
    for item in paper["exp_setup"]:
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.35), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.12), Inches(0.12), C_ACCENT_BLUE)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(12.2), Inches(0.42),
                    item, font_size=14, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.52)


def make_results(prs, paper):
    """Experimental results slide with table."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Experimental Results")

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.45), Inches(12.7), Inches(0.35),
                "Main benchmark results (selected key metrics):",
                font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_MID_BLUE)

    n_cols = len(paper["results"][0])
    col_w = Inches(12.7 / n_cols)
    col_widths = [col_w] * n_cols
    add_table(slide, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.85), Inches(12.7),
              paper["results"], col_widths=col_widths, text_size=13)


def make_discussion(prs, paper):
    """Analysis and discussion slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Analysis & Discussion")

    y = Inches(1.45)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(12.7), Inches(0.4), C_MID_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.4), y + Inches(0.04), Inches(12.4), Inches(0.34),
                "Key Findings, Ablation Studies & Insights", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

    y += Inches(0.52)
    for item in paper["discussion"]:
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.35), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.12), Inches(0.12), C_GOLD)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(12.2), Inches(0.42),
                    item, font_size=14, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.50)


def make_limitations(prs, paper):
    """Limitations and future work slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Limitations & Future Work")

    # Split into limitations / future work columns
    limits = [x for x in paper["limitations"] if not x.startswith("Future")]
    future = [x for x in paper["limitations"] if x.startswith("Future")]

    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.45), Inches(8.1), Inches(0.4), C_MID_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.4), Inches(1.49), Inches(7.9), Inches(0.34),
                "Limitations", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

    y = Inches(1.92)
    for item in limits:
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.35), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.12), Inches(0.12), C_ACCENT_BLUE)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(7.8), Inches(0.42),
                    item, font_size=13, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y += Inches(0.50)

    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(8.6), Inches(1.45), Inches(4.4), Inches(0.4), C_ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_textbox(slide, Inches(8.7), Inches(1.49), Inches(4.2), Inches(0.34),
                "Future Directions", font_size=14, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

    y2 = Inches(1.92)
    for item in future:
        # Strip "Future:" prefix
        clean = item.replace("Future: ", "").replace("Future work: ", "")
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(8.65), y2 + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.12), Inches(0.12), C_GOLD)
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(8.9), y2, Inches(4.0), Inches(0.70),
                    clean, font_size=13, color=C_DARK_GREY)
        y2 += Inches(0.75)


def make_summary(prs, paper):
    """Paper summary slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, f"{paper['short']} — Summary & Takeaways")

    y = Inches(1.5)
    for i, item in enumerate(paper["summary"]):
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.3), y, Inches(0.06), Inches(0.5), C_GOLD)
        add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.5), y, Inches(12.3), Inches(0.55), C_WHITE,
                      line_color=C_ACCENT_BLUE, line_width=Pt(0.5))
        add_textbox(slide, Inches(0.65), y + Inches(0.06), Inches(12.0), Inches(0.45),
                    item, font_size=15, color=C_DARK_GREY, bold=(i == 0))
        y += Inches(0.70)


def make_comparison(prs):
    """Cross-paper method comparison slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(slide, "Cross-Paper Comparative Analysis",
                   "Method and Performance Comparison Across the GPT Series")

    rows = [
        ["Dimension",          "GPT-1 (2018)",        "GPT-2 (2019)",         "GPT-3 (2020)",         "GPT-4 (2024)"],
        ["Parameters",         "117M",                 "1.5B",                 "175B",                 "~1T (est.)"],
        ["Training Data",      "BooksCorpus 800M",     "WebText 40GB",         "570GB web mix",        "Proprietary"],
        ["Context Window",     "512 tokens",           "1024 tokens",          "2048 tokens",          "8K–32K tokens"],
        ["Task Adaptation",    "Supervised fine-tune", "Zero-shot prompting",  "Few-shot in-context",  "RLHF + in-context"],
        ["Modalities",         "Text only",            "Text only",            "Text only",            "Text + Image"],
        ["LAMBADA Acc.",       "N/A",                  "63.24% (0-shot)",      "86.4% (few-shot)",     "N/A"],
        ["Safety Focus",       "Minimal",              "Staged release",       "Broader impacts",      "Full system card"],
    ]
    col_widths = [Inches(2.0), Inches(2.6), Inches(2.6), Inches(2.6), Inches(2.5)]
    add_table(slide, Inches(0.15), Inches(1.5), Inches(13.0),
              rows, col_widths=col_widths, text_size=11)


def make_ending(prs):
    """Final thank-you / Q&A slide."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_bg(slide, C_DARK_BLUE)

    add_rectangle(slide, 0, 0, Inches(0.5), SLIDE_H, C_GOLD)
    add_rectangle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.5), Inches(12.333), Inches(0.05), C_ACCENT_BLUE)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(11.5), Inches(1.2),
                "Thank You", font_size=52, bold=True, color=C_WHITE,
                align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.8), Inches(11.5), Inches(0.55),
                "Questions & Discussion",
                font_size=26, bold=False, color=C_GOLD, align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.8), Inches(11.5), Inches(0.5),
                "Papers: GPT-1 (2018)  ·  GPT-2 (2019)  ·  GPT-3 (2020)  ·  GPT-4 (2024)",
                font_size=15, color=C_LIGHT_BLUE, align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_textbox(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.4), Inches(11.5), Inches(0.5),
                "OpenAI Research  ·  Transformer-based Large Language Models",
                font_size=13, color=C_LIGHT_BLUE, align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ─── Main builder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_pptx(output_path="papers_analysis.pptx"):
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_W
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_H

    slide_index = {}  # paper_id -> {section -> slide_number}
    slide_counter = [1]

    def next_slide():
        n = slide_counter[0]
        slide_counter[0] += 1
        return n

    # ── Slide 1: Cover ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    make_cover(prs)
    next_slide()

    # ── Slide 2: TOC (placeholder, will be built after we know page numbers) ─
    # We'll add a dummy slide and track the index
    toc_slide_idx = len(prs.slides)  # 0-indexed position after cover
    # We need to add a blank slide now; fill in content after we know ranges
    toc_slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    toc_slide_number = next_slide()

    # ── Slide 3: Overview ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    make_overview(prs)
    next_slide()

    # ── Per-paper slides ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    paper_slide_info = []

    for paper in PAPERS:
        start = slide_counter[0]
        sections_info = []

        # Separator
        make_separator(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Paper Overview", next_slide()))

        # Basic Info
        make_basic_info(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Basic Information", next_slide()))

        # Background
        make_background(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Research Background & Motivation", next_slide()))

        # Contributions
        make_contributions(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Core Contributions", next_slide()))

        # Method
        make_method(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Methods / Architecture", next_slide()))

        # Experimental Setup
        make_exp_setup(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Experimental Setup", next_slide()))

        # Results
        make_results(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Experimental Results", next_slide()))

        # Discussion
        make_discussion(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Analysis & Discussion", next_slide()))

        # Limitations
        make_limitations(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Limitations & Future Work", next_slide()))

        # Summary
        make_summary(prs, paper)
        sections_info.append(("Summary", next_slide()))

        end = slide_counter[0] - 1
        paper_slide_info.append({
            "paper": paper,
            "start": start,
            "end": end,
            "sections": sections_info,
        })

    # ── Comparison slide ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    make_comparison(prs)
    comparison_slide = next_slide()

    # ── Ending slide ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    make_ending(prs)
    ending_slide = next_slide()

    total_slides = slide_counter[0] - 1

    # ── Fill in TOC slide ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    toc_slide_obj = prs.slides[toc_slide_idx]
    set_slide_bg(toc_slide_obj, C_LIGHT_GREY)
    add_header_bar(toc_slide_obj, "Table of Contents", "Papers and Section Coverage")

    positions = [
        (Inches(0.3), Inches(1.45)),   # paper 1 — top left
        (Inches(6.8), Inches(1.45)),   # paper 2 — top right
        (Inches(0.3), Inches(4.15)),   # paper 3 — bottom left
        (Inches(6.8), Inches(4.15)),   # paper 4 — bottom right
    ]

    for idx, info in enumerate(paper_slide_info):
        paper = info["paper"]
        px, py = positions[idx]
        slide_range = f"{info['start']}–{info['end']}"

        add_rectangle(toc_slide_obj, px, py, Inches(6.2), Inches(0.42), C_MID_BLUE)
        add_textbox(toc_slide_obj, px + Inches(0.1), py + Inches(0.04),
                    Inches(5.6), Inches(0.36),
                    f"{paper['short']} ({paper['year']})  ·  Slides {slide_range}",
                    font_size=13, bold=True, color=C_WHITE)

        for j, (sec_name, sec_slide) in enumerate(info["sections"][:6]):
            sy = py + Inches(0.48) + j * Inches(0.33)
            add_textbox(toc_slide_obj, px + Inches(0.2), sy, Inches(5.8), Inches(0.32),
                        f"  ›  {sec_name}  (p.{sec_slide})", font_size=11, color=C_DARK_GREY)

    # Add special entries at bottom
    add_textbox(toc_slide_obj, Inches(0.3), Inches(6.85), Inches(12.7), Inches(0.35),
                f"  Cross-Paper Comparison: p.{comparison_slide}   ·   Ending: p.{ending_slide}   ·   Total Slides: {total_slides}",
                font_size=12, color=C_MID_BLUE)

    # ── Save ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    prs.save(output_path)
    print(f"[✓] Saved: {output_path}  ({total_slides} slides)")
    return total_slides, paper_slide_info


# ─── JSON structure builder ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_json(total_slides, paper_slide_info, output_path="ppt_structure.json"):
    papers_json = []
    for info in paper_slide_info:
        paper = info["paper"]
        sections_json = [
            {
                "section_name": sec_name,
                "slide_number": sec_slide,
                "content_summary": f"Covers {sec_name.lower()} for {paper['short']} ({paper['year']})"
            }
            for sec_name, sec_slide in info["sections"]
        ]
        papers_json.append({
            "paper_id": paper["id"],
            "title": paper["title_1line"],
            "authors": paper["authors"],
            "venue": paper["venue"],
            "year": paper["year"],
            "start_slide": info["start"],
            "end_slide": info["end"],
            "sections": sections_json,
        })

    structure = {
        "title": "Multi-Paper Analysis: The GPT Series — From Supervised Fine-Tuning to Multimodal AI",
        "total_slides": total_slides,
        "total_papers": len(PAPERS),
        "generation_time": datetime.now().isoformat(),
        "summary_file": "papers_summary.md",
        "papers": papers_json,
        "design_info": {
            "color_scheme": "Dark Blue Professional Theme — Dark Blue (#0D2B55), Mid Blue (#1A4F8A), Accent Blue (#2E86C1), Gold (#F39C12)",
            "slide_dimensions": "13.333 x 7.5 inches (16:9 widescreen)",
            "font_settings": {
                "font_family": "Calibri",
                "title_font_size": "28–38pt bold",
                "subtitle_font_size": "16–22pt",
                "body_font_size": "13–15pt",
                "table_font_size": "11–13pt"
            }
        }
    }

    with open(output_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(structure, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    print(f"[✓] Saved: {output_path}")


# ─── Entry point ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("Generating papers_analysis.pptx ...")
    total_slides, paper_slide_info = build_pptx("papers_analysis.pptx")

    print("Generating ppt_structure.json ...")
    build_json(total_slides, paper_slide_info, "ppt_structure.json")

    print("\nAll outputs saved:")
    print("  papers_summary.md       — Paper analysis summary report")
    print("  papers_analysis.pptx    — Academic paper analysis PPT")
    print("  ppt_structure.json      — PPT structure file")
    print("  generate_ppt.py         — This generation script")
